message:
fix: hide communicate tool before MinResultRound instead of downgrading

gpt-5.3-codex stops entirely after any communicate(result) call regardless
of the tool response (error or downgrade). Instead of intercepting the call,
remove the communicate tool from the tool list for the first N rounds so the
model cannot attempt premature submission.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
